skills.name: review
skills.description: Full startup review through YC's lens — scores your idea, market, product, business model, moat, growth, and team

skills.name: roast
skills.description: Brutal PG-style feedback — strips the marketing language and tells you the hard truth

skills.name: apply
skills.description: Interactive YC application builder — walks you through every question, drafts answers from your codebase, stress-tests each one

skills.name: interview
skills.description: Mock 10-minute YC partner interview — two partners grill you rapid-fire with interruptions and follow-ups, then score you

skills.name: demo-day
skills.description: 60-second Demo Day pitch builder — generates a pitch script, scores each section, iterates until investor-ready

skills.name: office-hours
skills.description: Simulated 1-on-1 YC office hours — bring a problem, a partner works through it with you interactively

skills.name: metrics
skills.description: Find and analyze growth signals in your codebase — analytics, payments, auth, usage patterns

skills.name: speed-run
skills.description: Full YC readiness report — runs review + roast + metrics in sequence and produces an overall readiness score

skills.name: founders-like-you
skills.description: Find YC alumni companies with similar stacks, markets, or problems — surface their pitches, pivots, and growth stories
